extension.summary: Repository for Kodi MCP Server backend tools and addons
extension.description: Official repository for the Kodi MCP Server middle-layer backend and related tools. Provides structured, machine-friendly interfaces for remote Kodi operations.
extension.disclaimer: This repository provides development tools and backend infrastructure. Use at your own risk.
extension.summary: Repositorio para herramientas del servidor backend Kodi MCP
Repository für Kodi MCP Server Backend-Tools
Dépôt pour les outils backend Kodi MCP
